Task description states: 'temperatures will drop to -15°C'. Confirmed in task.json and task description

Based on verified melting points and -15°C threshold: Acetic acid glacial (16.6°C > -15°C), Nitrobenzene (5.7°C > -15°C), Phenol (40.6°C > -15°C) = 3 chemicals. Acetone (-94.7°C < -15°C) and Toluene (-95°C < -15°C) do NOT solidify
Task description and setup_task.sh script specify this output path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to look up melting points of five real chemicals from CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), a public NOAA/EPA database, and determine which will solidify at -15°C. All metadata claims are verified correct: (1) Acetic acid, glacial melting point ~16.6°C (range 14-19°C claimed) - SOLIDIFIES at -15°C; (2) Acetone melting point ~-94.7°C (range -98 to -92°C claimed) - does NOT solidify; (3) Nitrobenzene melting point 5.7°C (range 3-8°C claimed) - SOLIDIFIES at -15°C; (4) Toluene melting point -95°C (range -98 to -92°C claimed) - does NOT solidify; (5) Phenol melting point ~40.6°C (range 38-44°C claimed) - SOLIDIFIES at -15°C. The expected total risk count of 3 chemicals is verified correct. The data source is real (CAMEO Chemicals public website), not synthetic.
